ogTitle: Strzelecki vs Stuart Mill: Climate Safety

heading: Strzelecki vs Stuart Mill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Strzelecki, Victoria and Stuart Mill, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Stuart Mill has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Strzelecki (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Strzelecki or Stuart Mill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Strzelecki has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Stuart Mill scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Strzelecki scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Stuart Mill scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Strzelecki or Stuart Mill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Stuart Mill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
